Kuldeep Sharma

PhD Researcher · IIT Delhi

Education
2022 – Present

PhD in Computer Science & Engineering

Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi

Thesis: "Efficient Multimodal Learning for Visual Perception". Advisor: Prof. Rajesh Kumar. CGPA: 9.8/10. Supported by PMRF & Google PhD Fellowship.

2019 – 2021

M.Tech in Computer Science (AI Specialization)

Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi

Best Thesis Award. CGPA: 9.7/10. Focus on self-supervised learning for medical image analysis.

2015 – 2019

B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering

Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Roorkee

Gold Medal · CGPA 9.92/10 (Batch Topper) · Final-year project on deep CNN architectures for satellite image analysis.

Research Experience
Jun–Sep 2025

Research Intern — Google DeepMind

London, UK

  • Working on large-scale multimodal foundation model training with 10B+ parameter architectures.
  • Designing efficient video understanding modules for Gemini's video comprehension pipeline.
Oct–Dec 2023

Visiting Researcher — TU Munich (DAAD)

Munich, Germany · 3D AI Lab

  • Research on Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and dynamic 3D scene reconstruction.
  • Collaborated with Prof. Matthias Nießner on generalizable NeRF for outdoor scenes.
May–Aug 2022

Research Intern — Microsoft Research India

Bangalore, India · AI for Health Group

  • Developed prototype for automated medical report generation from chest X-rays.
  • Benchmarked 12 vision-language models on MIMIC-CXR, published findings at AISTATS 2023.
Selected Publications
  1. K. Sharma, A. Mehta et al. "Adaptive Token Merging for Efficient Video Understanding in Vision Transformers." NeurIPS 2025.
  2. K. Sharma, Y. Wang et al. "UniSSL: A Unified Self-Supervised Pre-Training Framework for Vision and Language." TPAMI, 2025.
  3. K. Sharma, L. Chen et al. "Cross-Modal Grounding with Hierarchical Attention for VQA." CVPR 2024. 🏆 Best Paper Award.
  4. K. Sharma, P. Gupta et al. "MedSight: Automated Radiology Report Generation." IJCV, 2024.
  5. K. Sharma, Y. Wang, B. Patel. "Self-Supervised 3D Scene Understanding via Contrastive Depth Estimation." ICCV 2023.

Full list: publications.html · Google Scholar

Teaching
Spring 2025CS 801 Advanced NLP — Instructor, IIT Delhi (28 students)
Autumn 2024CS 601 Machine Learning — Instructor, IIT Delhi (112 students)
Spring 2024CS 701 Deep Learning — Instructor, IIT Delhi (87 students)
Autumn 2023CS 402 Computer Vision — Teaching Assistant, IIT Delhi (145 students)

Professional Service

Reviewer: NeurIPS (2022–2025), CVPR (2023–2025), ICCV (2023), ECCV (2024), ICLR (2024–2025), ICML (2024), TPAMI, IJCV, Pattern Recognition

Area Chair: CVPR 2025 (Medical Vision Track)

Workshop Organiser: Efficient Vision Transformers Workshop, CVPR 2024; ML for Health Workshop, NeurIPS 2023

Volunteer: ICCV 2023 Student Volunteer, NeurIPS 2022 Diversity & Inclusion Chair

Kuldeep Sharma

PhD Researcher in Machine Learning & Computer Vision at IIT Delhi.
